${modID}:RelicID.NAME: Good Relic
${modID}:RelicID.FLAVOR: Flavor text displayed in detailed relic view.
DESCRIPTIONS: Gain [E] at the start of your turn. [E] is an energy icon.

${modID}:MyRelic.NAME: My Relic
${modID}:MyRelic.FLAVOR: I followed a tutorial and I'm proud of it!
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you play a card, gain #b

${modID}:NearDeathWhetstone.NAME: Near-Death Whetstone
${modID}:NearDeathWhetstone.FLAVOR: Sharpened only by those who have looked death in the eye.
DESCRIPTIONS: If you end combat with less than
HP, upgrade 1 random card in your deck.

${modID}:ParityStones.NAME: Parity Stones
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of your turn, if the tens digit of your current HP is even, gain 1 energy.

${modID}:EchoingBlade.NAME: Echoing Symbol
${modID}:EchoingBlade.FLAVOR: Every strike remembers the one before it.
DESCRIPTIONS: Immediately duplicate a random card in your deck (except basic Strikes and Defends).

${modID}:banner.NAME: Bloodstained Banner
${modID}:banner.FLAVOR: She didn't come here alone... and this proves it.
DESCRIPTIONS: At the end of combat, if your HP digit in the tens place is even, one of your card rewards is upgraded. If it's odd, gain a Liquid Vitality.

${modID}:SacredElixir.NAME: Sacred Elixir
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you rest at a campfire, fill all your empty potion slots with a Liquid Vitality.
